case_title: COOK, DWAYNE ODIS vs. BRASWELL, LLOYD JEFFERSON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOK, DWAYNE ODIS AS TO DEFENDANT BRASWELL, LLOYD JEFFERSON PREWER, RAYMOND EDWARD HERTZ RENTAL SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-06-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-07-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-18-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1994, CONTINUED TO JUN-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT PREWER, RAYMOND EDWARD HERTZ RENTAL
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOK, DWAYNE ODIS

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-20-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-04-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-04-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR OCT-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
AMENDED DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
